process_details: Ball milling at 30 Hz for 110 min (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); total mass 500 mg; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber.
detection_methods: XRPD; FTIR; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures remained amorphous for over 4 months when stored at 4 °C/0% RH (Table 3).
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5) is non-standard ICH protocol; XRPD detection at day 128, FTIR at day 133. Authors found no molecular SVS-GPZ interactions; stability attributed to GPZ acting as anti-plasticizer (higher Tg).
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5-desikkaattori) ei sovi mihinkään standardiluokkaan: kuiva mutta seuranta-aika >30 vrk, ei dry_short_term

process_details: Ball milling at 30 Hz for 110 min (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); total mass 500 mg; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber.
source_quote: onset of recrystallization was observed at 44 and 52 days when stored at 25 °C/0% RH by XRPD with 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures, respectively. However, FTIR suggested that recrystallization might have started even earlier, at 14 days (2:1 mixture)
notes: FTIR detected possible onset at day 14 (much earlier than XRPD day 44); using XRPD as bulk-crystallinity indicator. P2O5 desiccator dry storage but >30 vrk seuranta.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5-desikkaattori) ei sovi standardiin: ei ICH (RH=0%) eikä dry_short_term (>30 vrk)
FTIR ja XRPD erivät merkittävästi (14 vrk vs 44 vrk); kerätty XRPD-arvo voi olla aliarvio

process_details: Ball milling at 30 Hz for 110 min (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); total mass 500 mg; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber.
source_quote: At 25 °C/60% RH, the onset of recrystallization was found to be fast (detected at 8 and at 16 days for 2:1 and 1:1-mixtures respectively).
notes: RH 60% generated by saturated NaBr solution (matches ICH Q1A long-term conditions 25°C/60% RH). FTIR detected recrystallization within 2 days (much earlier than XRPD 8 days).

process_details: Ball milling at 30 Hz for 110 min (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); total mass 500 mg; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber.
detection_methods: XRPD; FTIR; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures remained amorphous for over 4 months when stored at 4 °C/0% RH (Table 3).
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5); XRPD detection at day 128, FTIR at day 139.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5-desikkaattori) ei sovi mihinkään standardiluokkaan

process_details: Ball milling at 30 Hz for 110 min (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); total mass 500 mg; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber.
source_quote: onset of recrystallization was observed at 44 and 52 days when stored at 25 °C/0% RH by XRPD with 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures, respectively. However, FTIR suggested that recrystallization might have started even earlier (...) at 35 days (1:1 mixture).
notes: FTIR detected onset at day 35 (earlier than XRPD day 52); using XRPD as bulk-crystallinity indicator.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk seuranta)
FTIR ja XRPD erivät (35 vrk vs 52 vrk)

process_details: Ball milling at 30 Hz for 110 min (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch); total mass 500 mg; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber.
source_quote: At 25 °C/60% RH, the onset of recrystallization was found to be fast (detected at 8 and at 16 days for 2:1 and 1:1-mixtures respectively). Again, FTIR showed that recrystallization occurred already within two days in these conditions.
notes: RH 60% via saturated NaBr; FTIR detected onset already at day 8 (earlier than XRPD day 16).

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
detection_methods: XRPD; FTIR; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture).
source_quote: At 4 °C/0% RH, the 2:1 co-amorphous mixture was found to be stable for over 2 months (Table 3).
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5); XRPD detection at day 74, FTIR at day 79. No molecular SVS-GPZ interactions detected (FTIR/PCA).
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi mihinkään standardiluokkaan

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
source_quote: the 2:1 CM mixture was much more stable in all conditions. Peaks started to appear at 53 and 46 days at 25 °C/0% RH and 25 °C/60% RH, respectively.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5); FTIR detection at day 58 (consistent with XRPD).
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk seuranta)

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
source_quote: the 2:1 CM mixture was much more stable in all conditions. Peaks started to appear at 53 and 46 days at 25 °C/0% RH and 25 °C/60% RH, respectively. FTIR measurements confirmed the onset of crystallization at 58 and 46 days in these conditions.
notes: RH 60% via saturated NaBr (matches ICH Q1A long-term).

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
detection_methods: XRPD; FTIR; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture).
source_quote: 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions (Fig. 6a and b and Table 3).
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5); XRPD detection at day 88, FTIR at day 85.
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi mihinkään standardiluokkaan

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
source_quote: 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions (Fig. 6a and b and Table 3).
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5); XRPD detection at day 74, FTIR at day 79.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk seuranta)

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
source_quote: 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions (...) [Table 3: 1:1 CM at 25 °C/60% RH: 74/65 days].
notes: RH 60% via saturated NaBr (matches ICH Q1A long-term); FTIR detection at day 65.

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
detection_methods: XRPD; FTIR; DSC (single Tg confirms single-phase amorphous mixture).
source_quote: FTIR and XRPD both showed that when stored at 4 °C/0% RH, the 1:2 SVS-GPZ CM mixture was stable for approx. 90 days.
notes: Storage at 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5); XRPD detection at day 95, FTIR at day 92. 1:2 CM was the most stable mixture (highest GPZ content → highest Tg).
review_reasons: Protokolla 4 °C/0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi mihinkään standardiluokkaan

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
source_quote: FTIR and XRPD indicated that, when stored at 25 °C/0% RH, 1:2 SVS-GPZ CM started to recrystallize after approx. 70 days of storage.
notes: Storage at 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5); XRPD detection at day 74, FTIR at day 72.
review_reasons: Protokolla 25 °C/0% RH (P2O5) ei sovi standardiin (RH=0%, >30 vrk seuranta)

process_details: Cryo-milling at 30 Hz for 60 min in oscillatory ball mill placed in cold room (+4 °C); chambers immersed in liquid nitrogen 2 min prior and at 10 min intervals; three 9 mm stainless steel balls per chamber. Total mass 500 mg.
source_quote: when stored at 25 °C/60% RH, onset of recrystallization was detected by XRPD after 74 days of storage, but FTIR indicated changes occurring already after 58 days of storage.
notes: RH 60% via saturated NaBr (matches ICH Q1A long-term); FTIR detected onset earlier (day 58) than XRPD (day 74).
